name: GoogleAccountPreparationPlan
description: Signup and account preparation plans for third-party platforms.

owner_user_id.description: ID of the user who owns this plan

owner_email.description: Email of the user who owns this plan

platform_profile_id.description: Optional ID of an existing VeloPlatformProfile

required_fields.description: List of fields required by the platform

suggested_values.description: Map of field names to suggested values from Google/Profile

prefill_payload.description: Payload that can be used to prefill a signup form safely

audit_summary.description: Summary of actions for the audit log
